title: myaris inaequalis
side_effects: Myaris inaequalis can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use can also lead to liver damage and kidney strain, potentially causing symptoms like jaundice and fatigue. In rare cases, improper use of Myaris inaequalis may cause allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and swelling. Excessive consumption can disrupt hormonal balances, leading to irregular menstrual cycles and mood swings in some individuals.
